ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vineyard where the sample was collected */,
  "batch_number" INTEGER /* Batch number for tracking production */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., red, white, sparkling) */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "grape_variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grape variety used */,
  "production_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production method used */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_production_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_method_id") REFERENCES production_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_grape_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("grape_variety_id") REFERENCES grape_varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_vineyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard_id") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vineyards" (
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vineyard */,
  "vineyard_name" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the vineyard */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vineyard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine region */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the vineyard was established */,
  "total_acreage" REAL /* Total acreage of the vineyard */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the vineyard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vineyard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vineyards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of chemical properties */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Amount of fixed acidity in the sample */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Amount of volatile acidity in the sample */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Amount of citric acid in the sample */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Amount of residual sugar in the sample */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Amount of chlorides in the sample */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Amount of free sulfur dioxide in the sample */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Amount of total sulfur dioxide in the sample */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the sample */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the sample */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Amount of sulphates in the sample */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the sample */,
  "tannins" REAL /* Amount of tannins in the sample */,
  "volatile_compounds" REAL /* Amount of volatile compounds in the sample */,
  "antioxidants" REAL /* Amount of antioxidants in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the sample (0-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the assessor */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality factor being assessed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES quality_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vineyard where the batch was produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of wine produced in liters */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grape variety used */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production method used */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the batch is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES grape_varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_vineyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard_id") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES production_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensory evaluation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample being evaluated */,
  "aroma_score" REAL /* Score assigned for aroma (0-10) */,
  "taste_score" REAL /* Score assigned for taste (0-10) */,
  "finish_score" REAL /* Score assigned for finish (0-10) */,
  "overall_impression" TEXT /* Overall impression of the wine */,
  "appearance_score" REAL /* Score assigned for appearance (0-10) */,
  "mouthfeel_score" REAL /* Score assigned for mouthfeel (0-10) */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_evaluations_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_evaluations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's wine characteristics */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the region */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average rainfall of the region */,
  "soil_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the soil in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grape_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine produced from this variety */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine region where the variety is commonly grown */,
  "average_sugar_content" REAL /* Average sugar content of the variety */,
  "average_acidity" REAL /* Average acidity of the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grape_varieties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the production method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the method influences wine quality */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine region where the method is commonly used */,
  "average_production_cost" REAL /* Average production cost associated with the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_methods_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality factor (e.g., acidity, tannins) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how this factor affects wine quality */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine region where the factor is most relevant */,
  "importance_score" INTEGER /* Importance score of the factor (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_factors_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id")
)
